evidence_summary: To provide emotional payoff for Dejah Thoris and establish her status as a hero.
John Carter transfers Princess Dejah Thoris to the Heliumite flagship. She is greeted with immense celebration, where she publicly credits Carter for her rescue, cementing his reputation.
Wide shots of the cheering crowd on deck.
